lesson_content.description: AI-generated lesson content: objective, explanation, examples, exercises, check questions.

copyright_policy: Store textbook metadata, TOC, page references, learning objectives, and AI-generated practice only.
Do not store full page text, songs, poems, stories, or images from SGK unless the project has usage permission.
For daily child learning, use page reference + parent-supervised activity + AI-generated derivative exercises.
Lesson content is AI-derived from verified metadata, labeled as 'ai_generated_from_verified_metadata'.
next_parse_stage: Stage 2 render page images locally for private QA only.
Stage 3 human/OCR extract lesson objectives and exercise types, not full copyrighted text.
Stage 4 generate AI practice cards aligned to lesson skill.
